The second half — that Maximus accompanied Pyrrhus to Rome in 645 — is not in the source at all: the source only says Maximus intended to proceed to Rome and that the disputation itself occurred in Africa in July 645; it never states that Pyrrhus traveled to Rome with him, and in fact says Pyrrhus 'returned afterwards to the see of Constantinople.' Because one component is not provable from the source, the author must fix it (mixed case → add_citation_or_rewrite).
fable_reasoning: Only the date component (645) is supported. Grep finds no statement that Pyrrhus admitted the error of Monotheletism or that Maximus accompanied him to Rome; the source says only that a disputation occurred and Pyrrhus was deposed. Distinctive outcome unproven; centrality guard -> unsupported.
